citations.quote: encourage a pedestrian-friendly, mixed-use-Main-Street character for this zone
use which is not specifically enumerated...is hereby declared to be a prohibited use

zones.notes: Pedestrian Main Street retail/service zone; storage and industrial uses not enumerated and not consistent with zone purpose.

citations.quote: Marina or boat storage yard
use which is not specifically enumerated...is hereby declared to be a prohibited use

zones.notes: River-oriented zone; only marina/boat storage allowed (not equivalent to self-storage). Other storage/industrial uses not enumerated, prohibited.

citations.quote: no building whatsoever shall be erected between the sea wall and the Atlantic Ocean

zones.notes: Oceanfront beach-activity zone with severe building restrictions; storage/industrial uses not permitted.

citations.quote: Existing light industrial parcels (not permitted to expand)
use which is not specifically enumerated...is hereby declared to be a prohibited use

zones.notes: Existing light industrial parcels listed as conditional use (no expansion permitted). Self-storage/mini-warehouse not enumerated, prohibited. Luxury garage condo inferred as conditional from light_industrial.

citations.quote: No building whatsoever shall be erected for any purpose nor shall any commercial use be permitted

zones.notes: No buildings or commercial uses allowed in this coastal zone.

citations.quote: use which is not specifically enumerated...is hereby declared to be a prohibited use

zones.notes: Residential zone; only single-family, churches, public parks permitted. Ordinance explicitly states unlisted uses are prohibited.

citations.quote: Multifamily residential, rental unit

zones.notes: Affordable housing overlay; only multifamily residential permitted.

zones.zone_name: Common Services Residence Senior Citizen District

citations.quote: permit construction of luxury common service residences for senior citizens

zones.notes: Senior citizen residence district only; no commercial or industrial uses.

citations.quote: Wholesale distribution centers and warehouses in the GC District only

zones.notes: GC permits wholesale distribution centers and warehouses, but not self-storage, mini-warehouse, or light industrial. Use list appears exhaustive; specialty storage uses not enumerated.

zones.zone_name: Mixed Use Affordable Housing Contribution Zone

citations.quote: One mixed use building

zones.notes: Mixed use building with ground floor RC uses; storage/industrial not among permitted RC uses.

citations.quote: non-residential principal use or uses otherwise permitted in the underlying zone

zones.notes: Permits mixed-use buildings with underlying zone non-residential uses; underlying commercial zones do not permit storage/industrial uses.

citations.quote: One detached dwelling unit per lot

zones.notes: Residential district; only detached dwellings, churches, schools, parks permitted. No industrial or storage uses.

citations.quote: Local retail activities including grocery stores, meat markets, seafood markets

GC District permits 'wholesale distribution centers and warehouses' but the list of principal permitted uses appears exhaustive and does not include self-storage, mini-warehouse, or light industrial as separately named uses.
